name: agent-project-card
description: Generate versioned, evidence-backed Agent Project Cards for agent-related software projects.

interface.longDescription: Analyze agent-related software projects with static evidence collection and produce validated, versioned Agent Project Cards and summaries.
defaultPrompt: Analyze this repository and create an Agent Project Card.
Refresh this project's Agent Project Card for the current revision.
Validate or migrate an existing Agent Project Card.
